name: SAASU Sync
body: [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000NejYyMAJ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000NejYyMAJ.jpg", "name": "saasusync.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 200, "width": 400}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by mysync", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://mysync.io/saasuandneto.html", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on website!"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on, contact "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://help.mysync.io/hc/en-us/requests/new", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "mysync"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Saasu Sync is designed for sole traders, contractors, startups and small businesses. Thousands of product and service businesses use cloud accounting to get their BAS and Single Touch Payroll done."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This add-on is built and maintained by mysync, and requires a Saasu account. Pricing can be found "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.saasu.com/pricing/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Features"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sync Orders and Inventory:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Update your Maropost products from your Saasu inventory stock levels. Sync orders, customers and payments from Neto."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Custom Data Flows:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Customise and add additional functionality for users when requested."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These data transfers can be configured in mysync."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Saasu"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up the Saasu Sync add-on in your Neto webstore:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, click the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find the Saasu Sync add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Saasu add-on will be installed in your control panel."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the pop-up window, click the "}, {"text": "Configure Saasu Sync", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow the steps on the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://help.mysync.io/hc/en-us/articles/4404104762905-SAASU-Sync-Neto-Guide", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "mysync help site"}]}, {"text": " to set up your SAASU Sync connection."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
